prestazioni: Upgrade the supercharged 5.2L V8 (engine code: *Voodoo* with *Predator* variant, 90mm throttle body) with a *Whipple 4.5L Gen 5 TVS2650 supercharger* (14.5psi boost, 1,200+ HP on E85) paired with *JE Pistons 2618 forged slugs* (9.5:1 compression) and *Manley H-beam connecting rods* (ARP 2000 bolts).

Replace the stock *Tremec TR-9070 7-speed dual-clutch* with a *Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox* (dog-ring engagement, 60ms shifts) and a *PPG straight-cut gearset* (1st: 2.97, 2nd: 2.10, 3rd: 1.52) for drag-strip launches, paired with a *South Bend Clutch triple-disc billet unit* (ceramic pucks, 1,500 lb-ft torque capacity).

Install a *Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger* (hybrid setup with *Precision Machining billet compressor wheel*) on a *custom A2W (air-to-water) intercooler* (VMP Racing core, 5.5L capacity) and *ID1700x fuel injectors* (2,200cc/min) fed by a *Fore Innovations 450LPH dual-pump fuel system* (E85-compatible) with a *Radium Engineering surge tank*.
estetica: Fit a *Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit* (carbon fiber fenders, 3.5-inch flares) with *custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap* (PPF clear-coated) and *Vorsteiner V-FF107 forged wheels* (20x11 front, 20x12 rear, +30mm offset, 285/30R20 and 325/25R20 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires).

Replace the stock hood with a *Carbon Creations GT500-specific carbon fiber hood* (dual ram-air scoops, 50% weight reduction) and install *Aeromotions Race Series active rear wing* (3-position adjustability, 200+ lbs downforce at 150mph) with *custom titanium mounting brackets*.

Swap the interior for *Recaro Pole Position seats* (carbon-Kevlar shell, 6-point Schroth harnesses) and a *MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel* (suede, quick-release hub), paired with a *Rollcage Innovations full chrome-moly cage* (NHRA 8.50-certified, bolt-in design) and *Vibrant Performance 1.75-inch primary header collectors* (ceramic-coated, 3-inch merge collectors).
